data.title: Melody Maison Ltd
data.metaDescription: Shop Melody Maison for stylish home décor, elegant mirrors, unique furniture and vintage-inspired accessories. Create beautiful interiors with affordable luxury.
data.ogDescription: Shop Melody Maison for stylish home décor, elegant mirrors, unique furniture and vintage-inspired accessories. Create beautiful interiors with affordable luxury.

issues.impact: You're not using the full space Google gives you in search results.
issues.fix: Expand to 50-60 characters with more descriptive, keyword-rich content

issues.impact: Google truncates long descriptions. Your call-to-action is probably getting cut off.
issues.fix: Trim to 150-160 characters. Put the most important info first.

issues.impact: Your links look terrible when shared on Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook. Broken thumbnail = low click rates.
issues.fix: Add og:title, og:description, og:image, and og:url to every page

issues.impact: Slow load times = higher bounce rates. Mobile users are leaving before your page loads.
issues.fix: Compress images, minify CSS/JS, enable gzip compression. Target under 500KB.

summary: We analyzed melodymaison.co.uk and found 4 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
